text_block_list.text: Before training one day...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's decided, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh... If you don't know, then I'll have you
experience it firsthand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Follow me!
A busy scene stands before me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come on, girls!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Remember now, just like we practiced!
What's my naaame?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She's the smartest of them all, and?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: The most noble and wise Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So naturally...

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: She's first-rate and admired by everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! And who stands on top of the world?

text_block_list.name: King Halo and Entourage
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Marvelous! Perfect! Everyone did
superb!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's wrong, Trainer? If you want to
applaud, you can go on ahead.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, are you surprised? This is my new
call-and-response routine for greeting the media!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After I make my debut, the interviews will start
pouring in. The dorm common room will be
adorned with my televised image daily! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why you need to remember the chant too!
When I ask "What's my name?" you answer with
"King!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Got it? Good!

And so, I'm forced to practice her call and
response for a while.

By the time we finally start real training, I'm
already exhausted, both mentally and physically.
And yet, despite her bossing me around all day...

She's running around, full of energy, ready to give
out even more orders.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer. One more lap!
Her relentless determination is truly admirable.

I'm looking forward to when she shows that
tenacity to rest of the world during her race
debut.

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text: Hello. You're King Halo's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Great! Can I ask what led you to team up with a
racer from such a famous family?

text_block_list.name: Sharp-Eared Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's not your turn to ask questions!
Trainer! Do you think she inherited her mother's
talent?

text_block_list.name: Overenthusiastic Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Is it true that she ran away from home to attend
Tracen Academy? Or was she given special
treatment and enrolled here?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I swear! What do you all think you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You should all be looking this way! You're missing
out on my run!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why do you think I took the trouble to inform
you of my training schedule?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, pay attention! I'm going to do one more lap
for you, so get your cameras ready!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but interview time is over.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh, Air Groove? Why are you here?

(It's Air Groove—vice president of the student
council. I heard she jumped into the world of
racing under the influence of her mother.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to provide some words of wisdom to both
you and the reporters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Take heed—King Halo has just stepped into her
role as a racer. With her debut right around the
corner, this is a pivotal time for her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She runs the risk of overstraining herself, onset by
sudden interviews like this. It may not be your
intention, but I won't have you risking her career
before it even begins.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the inconvenience, but please,
you'll have to leave.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, that was uncalled for.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: King, why would you think that was a good idea?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because no one out there understands who I am!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm just my mother's daughter to them! That's all
they ever talk about!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Your mother? I see...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You should have come to terms with this
beforehand, especially considering just who your
mother is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your mother stopped racing after numerous G1
wins. She still has a strong presence in the world
of Umamusume through her work as a first-rate
racewear designer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Surely, you must understand that it's only natural
the world take an interest in you as her daughter?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I understand it all too well and I hate it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why I organized this interview!
Everyone's treating me like I'm nothing more than
my mother's daughter!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am my own Umamusume, and my debut has
nothing to do with my mother!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
They should recognize me as the talented
newcomer King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's say you were to tell that to press. Then
what?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand how you feel, but your image should
not be your first priority.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It would be a different story if you were to say
that your primary goal for running is to gain
recognition.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If that is the case, then it would serve you well to
reconsider what you ought to be doing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not giving in to her. I've already thought this
over countless times.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I will not be simply filed away as my mother's
daughter. I am King Halo, a first-rate
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll say it again, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You and I have an obligation to show the world
my true talent.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone says, I must make the whole world acknowledge me—but especially her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Since long before I came here, she's insisted that I
have no talent.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "Her" being my mother.
Barely perceptible, a cold light glints in her eyes.

Her expression fails to hide the deep frustration
within her. It's clear the discord with her mother
weighs heavily on her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It would be a different story if you were to say
that your primary goal for running is to gain
recognition.

And just like her eyes, Air Groove's words pull at
my heart.
